description:
DesktopKeyringBackend (lib.rs:43) holds service and account, both non-secret String identifiers. It does not derive Debug.

Idiomatic Rust derives Debug on almost everything by default; the burden is on the author to opt out for security or surprise reasons. Here both fields are intentionally non-secret (the secret material lives in the OS keychain, not in this struct), so Debug is safe and useful.

Fix: add #[derive(Debug)] to the struct definition.

Why it matters: callers wrapping the backend in their own logging/tracing instrumentation cannot easily {:?}-format a SecretStore. Today this is silently impossible.
title: Missing #[derive(Debug)] on DesktopKeyringBackend
